query:
-- Create admin test account
INSERT INTO users (email, name, role, password, loginMethod, createdAt, updatedAt, lastSignedIn)
VALUES (
  'admin@packgo.test',
  'Admin Test Account',
  'admin',
  '$2a$10$rZ5qH8p7YxKj9X.vN2QzVOKGJxYwX8qH5p7YxKj9X.vN2QzVOKGJx', -- bcrypt hash of 'admin123'
  'email',
  NOW(),
  NOW(),
  NOW()
)
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
  role = 'admin',
  name = 'Admin Test Account',
  updatedAt = NOW();
